title: allium majus
intro: Allium majus, also known as the large-flowered garlic or great garlic, is a plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its large, showy flowers and strong garlic-like odor. The medicinal properties of Allium majus include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Allium majus include tea, tincture, and oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
